Script.script:
function ChatBoxMessages() if Legacy == nil then return end if Legacy.Settings.UI.Chatbox.ignoreMobs and Legacy.NDB.db[gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.talker:title()] == nil and gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.talker:title() ~= "You" then return end local msg = ansi2decho(gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.text) --gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.text:gsub("%\27%[[%dl;]+m", "") local channel = gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.channel
if msg:match("says to you") then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Direct:decho(msg.."
") end
if channel:match("clt") then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clans:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clanstab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clanstab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Clanstab:flash(1)]]) elseif channel == "says" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Says:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Saystab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Saystab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Saystab:flash(1)]]) elseif channel == "party" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Party:decho(msg.."
") elseif channel:match("tell") then if channel == "armytell" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") else Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tells:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tellstab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tellstab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Tellstab:flash(1)]]) end elseif channel == "ct" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.City:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Citytab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Citytab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Citytab:flash(1)]]) elseif channel == "market" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Market:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Markettab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Markettab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Markettab:flash(1)]]) Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
")
elseif channel == "ht" or channel == "hts" or channel == "hnt" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.House:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Housetab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Housetab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Housetab:flash(1)]])
elseif channel == "newbie" then Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbie:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbietab:flash(1) tempTimer(2, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbietab:flash(1)]]) tempTimer(4, [[Legacy.UI.Chatbox.Newbietab:flash(1)]]) else Legacy.UI.Chatbox.All:decho(msg.."
") end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text", "ChatBoxMessages")

Script.name: Legacy AK Display

ScriptGroup.name: Legacy Affs

Script.name: Aff manipulation
Script.script:
function Ltrack.gainedAff(...) local affs = {...} for _,aff in pairs(affs) do Ltrack.debug(aff) if Ltrack.score[aff:lower()] then if aff:lower() == 'sensitivity' and Ltrack.score.deaf == 100 then Ltrack.lostAff('deaf') else Ltrack.score[aff:lower()] = 100 table.insert(Ltrack.affs, aff:lower()) -- Adding to aff call list end end end Ltrack.lastGainedAff = affs[1] raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
function Ltrack.lostAff(...) local affs = {...} for _, aff in pairs(affs) do if Ltrack.score[aff:lower()] then Ltrack.score[aff:lower()] = 0 end end
Ltrack.lastLostAff = affs[1]:lower() raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
--[[ You can use this function to add backtracking to cures You can get REALLy specific with how you back track Anywhere you want to start a backtrack you can call this function and input a method You can name the method anything you want, and then add to the if block what you want That method to do. ]] function Ltrack.backTrack(method) local score = Ltrack.score local tracked = Ltrack.tracked Ltrack.debug(method) if (method == "smoked") then local ret = {}; Ltrack.lostAff('asthma', 'hellsight', 'slickness') if Ltrack.lastEaten == 'kelp' or Ltrack.lastEaten == 'aurum' then for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats['kelp']) do if table.contains(tracked, aff) and aff ~= 'asthma' then table.insert(ret, aff) end end
for _, aff in pairs(ret) do score[aff] = score[aff] + math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) if score[aff] > 100 then score[aff] = 100 end end end elseif method == "focus" then local ret = {}; if Ltrack.lastEaten == 'goldenseal' or Ltrack.lastEaten == 'plumbum' then for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats['goldenseal']) do if table.contains(tracked, aff) then table.insert(ret, aff) end end end for _, aff in pairs(ret) do score[aff] = score[aff] + math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) if score[aff] > 100 then score[aff] = 100 end end elseif method == 'smadness' then
local ret = {}; Ltrack.score.shadowmadness = 0 if Ltrack.lastEaten == 'goldenseal' or Ltrack.lastEaten == 'plumbum' then for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats['goldenseal']) do if table.contains(tracked, aff) and aff ~= 'shadowmadness' then table.insert(ret, aff) end end
for _, aff in pairs(ret) do score[aff] = score[aff] + math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) if score[aff] > 100 then score[aff] = 100 end end end elseif method == 'guilt' then local ret = {} Ltrack.lostAff('guilt') for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats['lobelia']) do if table.contains(tracked, aff) then table.insert(ret, aff) end end
for _, aff in pairs(ret) do score[aff] = score[aff] + math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) if score[aff] > 100 then score[aff] = 100 end end elseif method == 'priestMindCapstone' then local mindAffs = {"epilepsy", "dizziness", "confusion", "recklessness"} for _, aff in pairs(mindAffs) do score[aff] = 100 end elseif method == 'applied' then Ltrack.lostAff('slickness', 'anorexia') elseif method == 'fitness' then Ltrack.lostAff('asthma', 'weariness') local ret = {} for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats['kelp']) do if table.contains(tracked, aff) and aff ~= 'asthma' and aff ~= 'weariness' then table.insert(ret, aff) end end
for _, aff in pairs(ret) do score[aff] = score[aff] + math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) if score[aff] > 100 then score[aff] = 100 end end elseif method == 'applied' then Ltrack.lostAff('slickness') elseif method == 'ate' then if Ltrack.lastEaten == 'goldenseal' or Ltrack.lastEaten == 'plumbum' then local ret = {} for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats['goldenseal']) do if table.contains(tracked, aff) and aff ~= 'shadowmadness' then table.insert(ret, aff) end end
if table.contains(tracked, 'impatience') and ret <= 2 then Ltrack.lostAff('impatience') end end
end -- end of If/Block
raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end -- End of Backtrack
function Ltrack.smoked() if Ltrack.en.bals.smoke == false then return end local ret = {}; local score = Ltrack.score; Ltrack.setTracked() score.asthma = 0 Ltrack.lastMethod = 'smoked'
for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.smoke) do if score[aff] < 25 then Ltrack.score[aff] = 0 elseif score[aff] > 0 then table.insert(ret, aff) end end for _,aff in pairs(ret) do if #ret == 1 then score[aff] = 0 else score[aff] = score[aff] - math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) end
end
if enSmokeTimer then enSmokeTimer = nil Ltrack.en.bals.smoke = false enSmokeTimer = tempTimer(1.3, function() Ltrack.en.bals.smoke = true enSmokeTimer = nil end) else Ltrack.en.bals.smoke = false enSmokeTimer = tempTimer(1.3, function() Ltrack.en.bals.smoke = true enSmokeTimer = nil end) end Ltrack.backTrack('smoked') raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
function Ltrack.ate(cure) if Ltrack.en.bals.eat == false then return end local ret = {}; local score = Ltrack.score; Ltrack.setTracked() score.anorexia = 0 Ltrack.lastEaten = cure Ltrack.lastMethod = 'ate'
if cure == 'hawthorn' or cure == 'calamine' then Ltrack.gainedAff('deaf') raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) return elseif cure == 'bayberry' or cure == 'arsenic' then Ltrack.gainedAff('blind') raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) return end
for _, aff in pairs(Ltrack.eats[cure]) do if score[aff] < 25 then Ltrack.score[aff] = 0 elseif score[aff] > 0 then table.insert(ret, aff) end end for _,aff in pairs(ret) do if #ret == 1 then score[aff] = 0 else score[aff] = score[aff] - math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) end end
if enEatTimer then enEatTimer = nil Ltrack.en.bals.eat = false enEatTimer = tempTimer(1.3, function() Ltrack.en.bals.eat = true enEatTimer = nil end) else Ltrack.en.bals.eat = false enEatTimer = tempTimer(1.3, function() Ltrack.en.bals.eat = true enEatTimer = nil end) end
Ltrack.backTrack('ate')
-- Giving the 'aff' deafness to be cured with sensitivity -- Yeah I know it is weird
raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
function Ltrack.treed() if Ltrack.en.bals.tree == false then return end
local ret = {}; local score = Ltrack.score; Ltrack.setTracked() score.paralysis = 0 Ltrack.lastMethod = 'tree'
for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.tree) do
if score[aff] > 0 then table.insert(ret, aff) end end for _,aff in pairs(ret) do if #ret == 1 then score[aff] = 0 else score[aff] = score[aff] - math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) end end
if enTreeTimer then enTreeTimer = nil Ltrack.en.bals.tree = false enTreeTimer = tempTimer(12, function() Ltrack.en.bals.tree = true enTreeTimer = nil end) else Ltrack.en.bals.tree = false enTreeTimer = tempTimer(12, function() Ltrack.en.bals.tree = true enTreeTimer = nil end) end
raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
function Ltrack.applied(where) raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
function Ltrack.focused() if Ltrack.en.bals.focus == false then return end
local ret = {}; local score = Ltrack.score; Ltrack.setTracked() score.impatience = 0 Ltrack.lastMethod = 'focus'
for _,aff in pairs(Ltrack.focus) do if score[aff] < 25 then Ltrack.score[aff] = 0 elseif score[aff] > 0 then table.insert(ret, aff) end end
for _,aff in pairs(ret) do if #ret == 1 then score[aff] = 0 else score[aff] = score[aff] - math.floor(score[aff] / #ret) end end Ltrack.backTrack('focus')
if enFocustimer then enFocustimer = nil Ltrack.en.bals.focus = false enFocustimer = tempTimer(2.2, function() Ltrack.en.bals.focus = true enFocustimer = nil end) else Ltrack.en.bals.focus = false enFocustimer = tempTimer(2.2, function() Ltrack.en.bals.focus = true enFocustimer = nil end) end
raiseEvent('affsUpdated', aff) end
function Ltrack.hardreset() for aff, score in pairs(Ltrack.score) do Ltrack.score[aff] = 0 end Ltrack.totalaffs = 0 end
function Ltrack.totalAffs() local temp = {} local kelps = {} local mentals = {} local ginseng = {}
for aff,score in pairs(Ltrack.score) do if Ltrack.score[aff] > 0 then Legacy.echo(aff) table.insert(temp, aff) end
if Ltrack.score[aff] >= 50 then if table.includes(Ltrack.eats.kelp, aff) then
table.insert(kelps, aff) end if table.includes(Ltrack.focus, aff) then table.insert(mentals, aff) end
if table.includes(Ltrack.eats.ginseng, aff) then table.insert(ginseng, aff) end end end
Ltrack.totalaffs = #temp Ltrack.kelpscore = #kelps Ltrack.ginsengscore = #ginseng Ltrack.mentalscore = #mentals end registerAnonymousEventHandler('affsUpdated', 'Ltrack.totalAffs')
function Ltrack.affCall() if Ltrack.callAffs ~= true then return end if table.size(Ltrack.affs) == 0 then return end send('pt '..target..' hit with '..table.concat(Ltrack.affs, ', ')) Ltrack.affs = {} end

Script.name: Depthswalker
Priest
Alchemist
Target Aff checks
Script.script:
function hasAff(aff, prob) --Checks if an aff is greater than or equal to the given score local score = Ltrack.score if score[aff] >= prob then return true end return false end
function needsAff(aff, prob) --Checks if an aff is less than or equal to the given score local score = Ltrack.score if score[aff] <= prob then return true end return false end

Script.name: Basher
Script.script: function Basher_Setup() if (Legacy and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Room) then send("settarget "..gmcp.Char.Status.name) Legacy.Basher = Legacy.Basher or {} Legacy.Basher.Targets = Legacy.Basher.Targets or {} Legacy.Settings.Basher = Legacy.Settings.Basher or {} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes = Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes or {} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Ignore = Legacy.Settings.Basher.Ignore or {""} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Group = {} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Predictions = { ["recklessness"] = false} Legacy.Settings.Basher.lokiCount = 0 Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeAt = Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeAt or 10 Legacy.Settings.Basher.rainbows = Legacy.Settings.Basher.rainbows or true Legacy.Settings.Basher.gotGold = false if Legacy.Settings.Basher.powerThrough ~= true or Legacy.Settings.Basher.powerThrough == nil then Legacy.Settings.Basher.powerThrough = true end Legacy.Settings.Basher.Gold = 0 Legacy.Settings.Basher.shield = false Legacy.Settings.Basher.status = false Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeing = false Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeRoom = 1234 Legacy.Settings.Basher.damage = 0 Legacy.Settings.Basher.totalDamage = {} Legacy.Settings.Basher.damageTypes = {} Legacy.Settings.Basher.speed = 0 Legacy.Settings.Basher.speedType = 'balance' Legacy.Settings.Basher.seeDamageTrack = true Legacy.Settings.Basher.seeDamageTrackPreference = 'Total' Legacy.Settings.Basher.onlyTarget = false function Legacy.Basher.removeMobs(mob) if not mob then return '\nPlease specify a mob you would like removed.' end local mob = mob:lower() if not table.contains(Legacy.Basher.Targets, mob) then return "\nCouldn't find '"..mob.."' in our hunting database." end local areaTable = {} for area, denizen in pairs(Legacy.Basher.Targets) do if table.contains(Legacy.Basher.Targets[area], mob) then table.insert(areaTable, area) table.bremove(Legacy.Basher.Targets[area], mob) end end if table.size(areaTable) == 0 then return "\nCouldn't find '"..mob.."' in our hunting database." end return "\nRemoved '"..mob.."' from ("..#areaTable.."):\n"..table.concat(areaTable, '\n') end function Legacy.Basher.dps(arg) local speed = Legacy.Settings.Basher.speed local dmg = 0 local bigDamage = 0 for _, hit in pairs(Legacy.Settings.Basher.totalDamage) do if tonumber(hit) > bigDamage then bigDamage = tonumber(hit) end dmg = dmg + tonumber(hit) end local avg = dmg / #Legacy.Settings.Basher.totalDamage if arg == 'Highest' then return math.reint(bigDamage) end if arg == 'Total' then return math.reint(dmg) end if speed == 0 then return math.reint(math.floor(avg)) else return math.reint(math.floor(avg/speed)) end end function Legacy.Settings.Basher.Mobs() Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets = {} for k,v in pairs(gmcp.Char.Items.List.items) do if v.attrib == "m" and table.contains(Legacy.Basher.Targets[gmcp.Room.Info.area], v.name:lower()) and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and not table.contains(Legacy.Settings.Basher.Ignore, v.name:lower()) then Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets[v.id] = v.name end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Items.List", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.Mobs") function Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleEcho() local poss = {} for k,v in pairs(gmcp.Char.Items.List.items) do if v.attrib == "m" and table.contains(Legacy.Basher.Targets[gmcp.Room.Info.area], v.name:lower()) and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and not table.contains(Legacy.Settings.Basher.Ignore, v.name:lower()) then table.insert(poss, ""..v.name) elseif v.attrib == "m" and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and not table.contains(Legacy.Settings.Basher.Ignore, v.name:lower()) then table.insert(poss, ""..v.name) end end Legacy.Basher.Target() if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobCount() > 0 then cecho("\nPossible Targets ("..table.size(poss).."): \n"..table.concat(poss, "\n")) elseif Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and table.size(Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets) == 0 then Legacy.echo("No possible targets") end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Info", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleEcho") function Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobRemove() if table.contains(Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets, gmcp.Char.Items.Remove.item.id) and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true then Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets[gmcp.Char.Items.Remove.item.id] = nil if not gmcp.Char.Items.Remove.item.name:match("the corpse of") then Legacy.bigEcho(gmcp.Char.Items.Remove.item.name.." ran away!!!", "red", "gold") Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = false Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar = "" Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets[gmcp.Char.Items.Remove.item.id] = nil end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Items.Remove", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobRemove") function Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobAdd() if gmcp.Char.Items.Add.item.attrib == "m" and table.contains(Legacy.Basher.Targets, gmcp.Char.Items.Add.item.name) and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true then if not table.contains(Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets, gmcp.Char.Items.Add.item.id) then Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets[gmcp.Char.Items.Add.item.id] = gmcp.Char.Items.Add.item.name Legacy.echo("Added "..gmcp.Char.Items.Add.item.name.." to possible targets") Legacy.Basher.Target() end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Items.Add", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobAdd") if Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class] == nil then Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class] = { attack = "", pre = "", } end --Settings if Legacy.Settings.Basher.useRage ~= false or Legacy.Settings.Basher.useRage == nil then Legacy.Settings.Basher.useRage = true end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.flee ~= false or Legacy.Settings.Basher.flee == nil then Legacy.Settings.Basher.flee = true end function Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobCount() local mobs = 0 for k,v in pairs(gmcp.Char.Items.List.items) do if v.attrib == "m" then mobs = mobs + 1 end end return mobs end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Items", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobCount") function Legacy.Basher.Target() if Legacy.Basher.Targets[gmcp.Room.Info.area] == nil and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true then Legacy.Basher.Targets[gmcp.Room.Info.area] = {} end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and (gmcp.IRE.Target.Set == "" or Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar == "") and Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobCount() > 0 then for i, mob in pairs(Legacy.Basher.Targets[gmcp.Room.Info.area]) do for id, item in pairs(Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets) do if item:lower() == mob:lower() and Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar == "" and id ~= Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar and not table.contains(Legacy.Settings.Basher.Ignore, item:lower()) then send("st "..id) Legacy.Settings.Basher.shield = false Legacy.Settings.Basher.desc = item Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar = id break end end end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Items", "Legacy.Basher.Target") function Legacy.Settings.Basher.failsafes() if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true then if Legacy.Settings.BashercurrentTar == "" and gmcp.IRE.Target.Set ~= "" then Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar = gmcp.IRE.Target.Set elseif gmcp.IRE.Target.Set == "" then end Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = false Legacy.Settings.Basher.shield = false end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Info", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.failsafes") function Legacy.Settings.Basher.FleeTracker() Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeing = false currentRoom = gmcp.Room.Info.num currentExits = {} for k,v in pairs(gmcp.Room.Info.exits) do currentExits[v] = tostring(k) end if lastRoom == nil then lastRoom = 1234 end if currentRoom ~= lastRoom then Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeExit = currentExits[lastRoom] end lastRoom = gmcp.Room.Info.num end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Info", "Legacy.Settings.Basher.FleeTracker") function Legacy.Basher.flee(room) if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == false then return end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.flee == false then return end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeExit == currentExits[Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeRoom] then return end Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeRoom = room send("queue addclear freestand go "..Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeExit) end --send("queue addclear freestand go "..Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeExit) function Legacy.Basher.Attack() if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == false then return end if gmcp.IRE.Target then if Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeing == true then return end if Legacy[gmcp.Char.Status.name].Vitals.hpPer <= math.floor(tonumber(Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeAt) + 2) and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.blackout and Legacy.Settings.Basher.flee == true then Legacy.bigEcho("Flee! Run for your life!!", "gold", "red") Legacy.Basher.flee(gmcp.Room.Info.num) Legacy.Settings.Basher.fleeing = true return end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true then if (gmcp.Char.Vitals.eq or gmcp.Char.Vitals.bal) == "0" then return end if (gmcp.Char.Vitals.eq and gmcp.Char.Vitals.bal) == "1" then attacked = false end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued == true then return end if attacked == true then return end end local str = string.gsub(gmcp.IRE.Target.Info.hpperc, "%%", "") local health = tonumber(str) if Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == false then return end --if gmcp.IRE.Target.Info.short_desc:match("a harrowing thrall of") and health < 21 then cecho("\nDON'T KILL THE THRALL!") Legacy.Settings.Basher.status = false end if gmcp.IRE.Target.Set == "Aranos" then send("settarget none") return end sendCount = sendCount or 0 if sendCounter then killTimer("sendCounter") sendCounter = tempTimer(10, function() if sendCount < 49 then sendCount = 0 end end ) else sendCounter = tempTimer(10, function() if sendCount < 49 then sendCount = 0 end end ) end if (Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar == "" and table.size(Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets) > 0) then for k,v in pairs(Legacy.Settings.Basher.possibleTargets) do Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar = tostring(k) send("settarget "..k) break end send("ql") return end if Legacy.Settings.Basher.onlyTarget == true then return end if sendCount >= 20 then Legacy.bigEcho("SOMETHING BROKE, TURNING HUNTING OFF", "red", "gold") Legacy.Settings.Basher.status = false return end if gmcp.IRE.Target.Set == "" and not table.contains(gmcp.Char.Items.List, Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar) then Legacy.Settings.Basher.currentTar = "" end if gmcp.IRE.Target.Info.hpperc ~= "-1" and not (Legacy.Curing.Affs.brokenleftarm and Legacy.Curing.Affs.brokenrightarm) and gmcp.IRE.Target.Set ~= "Aranos" and Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued == false and sendCount < 50 and Legacy.Settings.Basher.status == true and ((tonumber(gmcp.Char.Vitals.hp) > 0 and gmcp.Char.Vitals.hp ~= nil) or (gmcp.Char.Vitals.hp == nil and Legacy.Settings.Basher.powerThrough == true)) and gmcp.IRE.Target.Set ~= "" and gmcp.Char.Vitals.eq == "1" and gmcp.Char.Vitals.bal == "1" and Legacy.Settings.Basher.mobCount() > 0 and (Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class].attack ~= nil or Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class].attack ~= "") and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.transfixed and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.impaled and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.entangled and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.sleeping and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.webbed and not Legacy.Curing.Affs.aeon then if Legacy.Settings.Basher.shield == false then local str = string.gsub(gmcp.IRE.Target.Info.hpperc, "%%", "") local health = tonumber(str) if health >= Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class].configRage.bigDamage then for k,v in pairs(Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class]) do if v.desc == "Big Damage" then if math.floor(Legacy[gmcp.Char.Status.name].rage - v.rage) >= 17 and v.available == true and Legacy.Settings.Basher.useRage == true then send("queue add freestand "..v.cmd) send("queue add freestand basher") Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = true tempTimer(26, function() v.available = true end) v.available = false elseif Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued == false then send("queue add freestand basher") Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = true end end end elseif health >= Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class].configRage.smallDamage then for k,v in pairs(Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes[gmcp.Char.Status.class]) do if v.desc == "Small Damage" then if math.floor(Legacy[gmcp.Char.Status.name].rage - v.rage) >= 17 and v.available == true and Legacy.Settings.Basher.useRage == true then send("queue add freestand "..v.cmd) send("queue add freestand basher") Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = true tempTimer(19, function() v.available = true end) v.available = false elseif Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued == false then send("queue add freestand basher") Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = true end end end elseif Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued == false then send("queue add freestand basher") Legacy.Settings.Basher.queued = true end end sendCount = sendCount + 1 end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", "Legacy.Basher.Attack") Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes["earth Elemental Lord "].configRage = {bigDamage = 20, smallDamage = 0, affAttack = 100} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes["earth Elemental Lady"].configRage = {bigDamage = 20, smallDamage = 0, affAttack = 100} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes["earth Elemental Lord "].nrshieldbreak = {cmd = "", rage = 0, desc = "Raze"} Legacy.Settings.Basher.Classes["earth Elemental Lady"].nrshieldbreak = {cmd = "", rage = 0, desc = "Raze"} end end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("LegacyLoaded", "Basher_Setup")

Script.name: Rainbow Script
Script.script:
function rainbow(str, type, freq) -- default settings, set to default if out-of-bounds type = type or 0 if type > 2 or type < 0 then type = 0 end
freq = freq or 15
if freq < 0 or freq > 360 then freq = 15 end
local product = "" local phase = 2 * math.pi / 3
local rand = betterRand()
if type == 0 then -- Non-repeating rainbow freq = 2*math.pi / #str for i = 1, #str do if string.sub(str, i, i) == " " then product = product..string.sub(str, i, i) else r = math.sin(freq*i + phase + rand*10) * 127 + 128 g = math.sin(freq*i + 0 + rand*10) * 127 + 128 b = math.sin(freq*i + 2*phase + rand*10) * 127 + 128 r = string.format("%x", r) g = string.format("%x", g) b = string.format("%x", b)
if #r < 2 then r = "0"..r end if #g < 2 then g = "0"..g end if #b < 2 then b = "0"..b end product = product.."|c"..r..g..b..string.sub(str, i, i) end end elseif type == 1 then -- Repeating rainbow
freq = freq * math.pi / 180 for i = 1, #str do if string.sub(str, i, i) == " " then product = product..string.sub(str, i, i) else r = math.sin(freq*i + phase + rand*10) * 127 + 128 g = math.sin(freq*i + 0 + rand*10) * 127 + 128 b = math.sin(freq*i + 2*phase + rand*10) * 127 + 128 r = string.format("%x", r) g = string.format("%x", g) b = string.format("%x", b)
if #r < 2 then r = "0"..r end if #g < 2 then g = "0"..g end if #b < 2 then b = "0"..b end product = product.."|c"..r..g..b..string.sub(str, i, i) end end elseif type == 2 then -- Old, uglier rainbow local colours = { "|cFF0000", "|cFF6600", "|cFFEE00", "|c00FF00", "|c0099FF", "|c4400FF", "|c9900FF" } local pass = math.random(7)
for char in str:gmatch"." do if char == " " then product = product .. char else product = product .. colours[pass] .. char if pass == #colours then pass = 1 end pass = pass + 1 end end end return product.."|r" end
function betterRand() randomtable = {} for i = 1, 97 do randomtable[i] = math.random() end local x = math.random() local i = 1 + math.floor(97*x) x, randomtable[i] = randomtable[i], x return x end

Script.name: limb init
limb management
Script.script:
function lb.addHit(name, ltar, amount) lb.recentBreaks = lb.recentBreaks or {} name = name:lower():title() if not lb[name] then lb.initTarget(name) end if not lb[name].hits[ltar] then cecho("<red>(!) Limb not found: " .. tostring(ltar) .. ".\n") return end lb[name].hits[ltar] = lb[name].hits[ltar] + amount if lb[name].hits[ltar] >= 100 and not lb.recentBreaks[ltar] then lb.recentBreaks[ltar] = tempTimer(8, function() killTimer(lb.recentBreaks[ltar]) lb.recentBreaks[ltar] = nil end) end if lb[name].t[ltar] then killTimer(lb[name].t[ltar]) end lb[name].t[ltar] = tempTimer(180, [[ lb.resetLimb("]] .. name .. [[", "]] .. ltar .. [[") lb["]] .. name .. [["].t["]] .. ltar .. [["] = nil ]]) cecho(" " .. ((lb[name].hits[ltar] > 100 and "<firebrick>") or "<ansi_yellow>") .. "(" .. ((lb[name].hits[ltar] > 100 and "<orange_red>") or "<yellow>") .. lb[name].hits[ltar] .. "%" .. ((lb[name].hits[ltar] > 100 and "<firebrick>") or "<ansi_yellow>") .. ")") raiseEvent("limb hits updated", name, ltar, amount) end
function lb.resetLimb(name, ltar) name = name:lower():title() if not lb[name].hits[ltar] then cecho("<red>(!) Limb not found: " .. tostring(ltar) .. ".\n") return end lb[name].hits[ltar] = 0 lb.echo("Reset " .. name .. ((name:sub(-1) == "s" and "'") or "'s") .. " " .. ltar .. ".") end
function lb.salve(name, area) lb[name].t.cure = tempTimer(3.7, [[ local convert = { head = {"head"}, torso = {"torso"}, arms = {[1] = "left arm", [2] = "right arm"}, legs = {[1] = "left leg", [2] = "right leg"}, } if not convert["]] .. area .. [["] then return end for _, ltar in ipairs(convert["]] .. area .. [["]) do if lb["]] .. name .. [["].hits[ltar] >= 100 then if lb["]] .. name .. [["].t.cure then killTimer(lb["]] .. name .. [["].t.cure) end lb.resetLimb("]] .. name .. [[", ltar, true) if lb["]] .. name .. [["].t[ltar] then killTimer(lb["]] .. name .. [["].t[ltar]) lb["]] .. name .. [["].t[ltar] = nil end lb["]] .. name .. [["].t.cure = nil break end end ]]) end
function lb.resetAll(name) for _, v in ipairs({"head", "torso", "left arm", "right arm", "left leg", "right leg"}) do if lb[name] then if lb[name].hits[v] > 0 then lb.resetLimb(name, v) end if lb[name].t[v] then killTimer(lb[name].t[v]) lb[name].t[v] = nil end end end end

Script.name: limb prompt
Script.script: function lb.prompt() if not lb[target] then return "" end local ret = {} -- CHANGE ORDER BELOW! CHANGE ORDER BELOW! CHANGE ORDER BELOW! CHANGE ORDER BELOW! CHANGE ORDER BELOW! CHANGE ORDER BELOW! -- for _, v in ipairs({"head", "torso", "left arm", "right arm", "left leg", "right leg"}) do ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- table.insert(ret, ((lb[target].hits[v] > 100 and "<red>") or ((lb[target].hits[v] > 0 and "<orange>") or "<grey>")) .. lb[target].hits[v]) end return "<DimGrey>[" .. table.concat(ret, "<DimGrey>|") .. "<DimGrey>]" end

ScriptGroup.name: Priest

Script.name: Priest Attack
Script.script:
function Priest.attked() if target == 'none' or target == 'None' then return end if Legacy.Aranos.class ~= 'Priest' then return end if autoattk == false then return end local LA = lb[target].hits["left arm"] or 0 local RA = lb[target].hits["right arm"] or 0 local LL = lb[target].hits["left leg"] or 0 local RL = lb[target].hits["right leg"] or 0 local T = lb[target].hits["torso"] or 0 local H = lb[target].hits["head"] or 0 local plen = tonumber(Legacy.Aranos.prayerlength) local conviction = tonumber(Legacy.Aranos.conviction) local aff = table.deepcopy(Ltrack.score) Priest.fragility = false attk = nil
if plen == 0 then Priest.usedHellsight = false Priest.usedWrath = false end
--Recites if aff.asthma >= 60 and conviction >= 10 and plen >= 3 and aff.hellsight < 30 and Ltrack.priest.usedHellsight == false then Priest.recite = "revelations"
elseif aff.guilt < 100 then Priest.recite = "guilt" elseif aff.paralysis < 100 and aff.healthleech < 20 then Priest.recite = 'penance' elseif aff.spiritburn < 30 then Priest.recite = "ash" elseif aff.justice < 50 and Legacy.Curing.Affs['weariness'] then Priest.recite = "condemnation" -- elseif Ltrack.totalaffs >= 4 and Priest.usedWrath == false and conviction >= 20 and plen >= 1 then -- Priest.recite = 'wrath' elseif aff.tenderskin < 30 then Priest.recite = 'burn'
-- elseif aff.inquisition == 100 and aff.ablaze < 100 then -- Priest.recite = "purge" elseif aff.paralysis < 100 and aff.prone < 100 then Priest.recite = "penance" else Priest.recite = 'burn' end
if not Prepped("LL") and parry == "leftleg" then -- if they are parrying we are forcing penance for prep Priest.limbTar = "left leg" Priest.recite = "penance" elseif not Prepped("RL") and parry == "rightleg" then --same as above Priest.limbTar = "right leg" Priest.recite = "penance"
elseif not Prepped("LL") and parry ~= "leftleg" then -- normal prep Priest.limbTar = "left leg" elseif not Prepped("RL") and parry ~= "rightleg" then -- normal prep Priest.limbTar = "right leg"
elseif aff.prone == 100 and Prepped("LL") and LL < 101 and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") and aff.inquisition == 100 then Priest.limbTar = "left leg" attk = 'break' elseif aff.prone == 100 and Prepped("RL") and RL < 101 and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") and aff.inquisition == 100 then Priest.limbTar = "right leg" attk = 'break'
elseif aff.prone < 100 and Prepped("LL") and LL < 101 and (aff.inquisition == 100 or Priest.canInquis()) and (parry == "leftleg" or parry == nil) then Priest.limbTar = "right leg" attk = "inquisbreak" if aff.paralysis < 100 then Priest.recite = "penance" end elseif aff.prone < 100 and Prepped("RL") and RL < 101 and (aff.inquisition == 100 or Priest.canInquis()) and (parry == "rightleg" or parry == nil) then Priest.limbTar = "left leg" attk = "inquisbreak" if aff.paralysis < 100 then Priest.recite = "penance" end elseif aff.prone < 100 and Prepped("LL") and LL < 101 and aff.inquisition == 100 and parry ~= "leftleg" then Priest.limbTar = "left leg" attk = "Prone" elseif aff.prone < 100 and Prepped("RL") and RL < 101 and aff.inquisition == 100 and parry ~= "rightleg" then Priest.limbTar = "right leg" attk = "Prone"
else Priest.limbTar = "" attk = 'smash' end
--Rebukes
if plen >= 3 then if aff.guilt == 100 and aff.masochism < 30 and ((LL < 90 or RL < 90) or aff.inquisition == 100 or Ltrack.priest.usedHellsight == true ) then Priest.rebuke = " rebuke evil" elseif aff.guilt == 100 and aff.hallucinations < 30 and ((LL < 90 or RL < 90) or aff.inquisition == 100 or Ltrack.priest.usedHellsight == true ) then Priest.rebuke = " rebuke chaos" end else Priest.rebuke = "" end
--Chastens if aff.paralysis < 100 and Priest.recite ~= "penance" then Priest.chasten = "paralysis" elseif aff.asthma < 100 then Priest.chasten = "asthma" elseif aff.clumsiness < 50 then Priest.chasten = "clumsy" elseif aff.healthleech < 35 then Priest.chasten = "healthleech" else Priest.chasten = "mind" end
if nohit == true then Priest.limbTar = "" end
if Ltrack.defs.shield then return "recite penance/angel strip" elseif Ltrack.mana <= 50 then return "recite wrath/angel absolve "..target.."/contemplate "..target elseif attk == 'inquisbreak' then return Priest.pre.."/recite ash rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.."/angel push "..target.."/contemplate "..target elseif aff.prone == 100 and (table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg")) then if plen >= 1 then return "recite wrath/angel sap".."/contemplate "..target elseif aff.guilt < 100 then return "recite guilt/angel sap".."/contemplate "..target elseif aff.spiritburn < 100 then return "recite ash/angel sap".."/contemplate "..target elseif aff.tenderskin < 100 then return "recite burn/angel sap".."/contemplate "..target else return "recite wrath/angel sap".."/contemplate "..target end
-- elseif aff.guilt == 100 and aff.spiritburn < 100 and aff.inquisition < 100 and Prepped('LL') and Prepped('RL') and enEat == false and plen >= 4 and aff.prone < 100 then -- return Priest.pre.."/recite ash rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.."/angel push "..target.."/contemplate "..target -- elseif aff.spiritburn >= 40 and aff.guilt < 100 and aff.inquisition < 100 and Prepped('LL') and Prepped('RL') and enEat == false and plen >= 4 and aff.prone < 100 then -- return Priest.pre.."/recite ash rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.."/angel push "..target.."/contemplate "..target
-- elseif LL >= 99 and aff.impatience >= 60 and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'left leg') then -- return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." left leg/angel push "..target -- elseif RL >= 99 and aff.impatience >= 60 and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'right leg') then -- return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." right leg/angel push "..target --elseif (aff.slickness > 0 or (table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") or table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg"))) and aff.asthma >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.impatience >= 50 then -- return "recite ash/perform fasting".."/contemplate "..target elseif Sap() >= 40 and plen >= 1 then return "recite wrath/angel sap "..target.."/contemplate "..target --[[ elseif aff.inquisition < 100 and aff.spiritburn >= 50 and aff.guilt > 0 and plen >= 4 then if LL < 100 and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") and parry ~= "leftleg" then return Priest.pre.."/recite penance rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." left leg/angel push "..target.."/contemplate "..target else return Priest.pre.."/recite penance rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." right leg/angel push "..target.."/contemplate "..target end ]] elseif aff.guilt == 100 and aff.spiritburn < 100 and aff.inquisition < 100 and plen >= 4 then return Priest.pre.."/recite ash rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target elseif aff.guilt < 100 and aff.spiritburn == 100 and aff.inquisition < 100 and plen >= 4 then return Priest.pre.."/recite guilt rebuke heresy/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target elseif attk == "Prone" then return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.."/angel push "..target --elseif aff.inquisition == 100 then --return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smash legs "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten elseif attk == 'smash' then return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smash arms "..target.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target elseif attk == 'break' then if aff.guilt < 100 then return Priest.pre.."/recite guilt "..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target elseif aff.spiritburn < 100 then return Priest.pre.."/recite ash "..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target else return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target end -- elseif aff.guilt == 100 and aff.stupidity < 30 and enEat == false and affstrack.totalaffs >= 4 then -- return Priest.pre.."/recite penance"..Priest.rebuke.."/perform dazzle" --Giving stupidity else return Priest.pre.."/recite "..Priest.recite..Priest.rebuke.."/smite "..target.." "..Priest.limbTar.." chasten "..Priest.chasten.."/contemplate "..target end end registerAnonymousEventHandler('affsUpdated', 'Priest.attk')

Script.name: Illuminate Blink
Script.script:
function orbBlink( room ) local durationn room = tonumber(room) orbLastRoom = orbLastRoom or 7
highlightRoom(room, 0,0,200,255,255,255, 1, 255, 255)
orbLastRoom = room end

Script.name: Sap calc
New script

ScriptGroup.name: Runewarden
ScriptGroup.script:
Runewarden = Runewarden or {} Runewarden.SnB = Runewarden.SnB or {} Runewarden.DwC = Runewarden.DwC or {} Runewarden.TwoHand = Runewarden.TwoHand or {} Runewarden.DwB = Runewarden.DwB or {}
Runewarden.DwC.scimOne = "scimitar482171" Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo = "scimitar482220" Runewarden.hugUlots = "battleaxe370242" Runewarden.DwC.dsl = 15.8 Runewarden.DwC.pre = "stand/stand/get body/get body/get body/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/" Runewarden.DwC.attack = { limb = '', state = '', }
Runewarden.SnB.pre = "stand/stand/get body/get body/get body/wield longsword463778 shield188446/" Runewarden.longsword = "longsword463778"
Runewarden.venoms = { ["xentio"] = "clumsiness", ["eurypteria"] = "recklessness", ["kalmia"] = "asthma", ["delphinium"] = "sleep", ["digitalis"] = "shyness", ["darkshade"] = "darkshade", ["curare"] = "paralysis", ["epteth"] = "crippledarm", ["prefarar"] = "sensitivity", ["monkshood"] = "disloyalty", ["euphorbia"] = "nausea", ["colocasia"] = "deafblind", ["vernalius"] = "weariness", ["epseth"] = "crippledleg", ["larkspur"] = "dizziness", ["slike"] = "anorexia", ["notechis"] = "haemophilia", ["vardrax"] = "addiction", ["aconite"] = "stupidity", ["selarnia"] = "selarnia", ["gecko"] = "slickness", ["scytherus"] = "scytherus", ["voyria"] = "voyria",
["clumsiness"] = "xentio", ["recklessness"] = "eurypteria", ["asthma"] = "kalmia", ["sleep"] = "delphinium", ["shyness"] = "digitalis", ["paralysis"] = "curare", ["crippledarm"] = "epteth", ["sensitivity"] = "prefarar", ["disloyalty"] = "monkshood", ["nausea"] = "euphorbia", ["deafblind"] = "colocasia", ["weariness"] = "vernalius", ["crippledleg"] = "epseth", ["dizziness"] = "larkspur", ["anorexia"] = "slike", ["addiction"] = "vardrax", ["stupidity"] = "aconite", ["selarnia"] = "selarnia", ["slickness"] = "gecko", ["pothealthleech"]= "healthleech", ["potloneliness"] = "loneliness", ["potepilepsy"] = "epilepsy", [""] = "" }
function Runewarden.configs(set) if set == "snb" then sendAll("sketch nairat on "..Runewarden.longsword, "sketch Configuration "..Runewarden.longsword.." isaz inguz wunjo", "empower priority set inguz isaz wunjo") elseif set == "dwc" then -- sendAll("smudge kena on "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne, "sketch nairat on "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne, "sketch Configuration "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." inguz sowulu sleizak", "empower priority set inguz sowulu sleizak") sendAll("smudge "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne..' sleizak',"sketch pithakhan on "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne, "sketch Configuration "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." kena mannaz isaz", "empower priority set kena isaz mannaz") end end
function Runewarden.DwC.prepped(limb)
local limbs = { LL = "left leg", RL = "right leg", LA = "left arm", RA = "right arm", H = "head", T = "torso", }
if lb[target].hits[limbs[limb]] + Runewarden.DwC.dsl < 100 then return false else return true end end
function Runewarden.SnB.prepped(limb)
local limbs = { LL = "left leg", RL = "right leg", LA = "left arm", RA = "right arm", H = "head", T = "torso", }
if lb[target].hits[limbs[limb]] + Runewarden.SnB.slice < 100 then return false else return true end end
function Runewarden.DwC.venoms() local aff = table.deepcopy(Ltrack.score) local vcon = Runewarden.venoms local v1 = "" local v2 = ""
if aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.asthma >= 60 then v1 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.nausea < 50 and manapercent > 40 then v1 = vcon.nausea --elseif affstrack.kelpscore >= 2 and aff.slickness < 50 then --v1 = vcon.slickness --elseif aff.paralysis == 50 and aff.slickness == 50 and (aff.leftarm < 100 or aff.rightarm < 100) then -- v1 = "epteth" elseif aff.paralysis < 100 then v1 = vcon.paralysis elseif aff.clumsiness <= 40 then v1 = vcon.clumsiness elseif aff.asthma < 100 then v1 = vcon.asthma
elseif aff.weariness < 20 then v1 = vcon.weariness elseif aff.disloyalty < 50 then v1 = vcon.disloyalty elseif aff.addiction < 50 then v1 = vcon.addiction elseif aff.darkshade < 20 and aff.nausea >= 60 then v1 = vcon.darkshade elseif aff.slickness < 100 then v1 = vcon.slickness end
if aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.slickness < 100 and aff.asthma >= 60 then v2 = vcon.slickness elseif aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.slickness == 100 then v2 = vcon.stupidity --elseif v1 == "epteth" then -- v2 = "curare" elseif aff.nausea < 100 and v1 ~= vcon.nausea and manapercent > 40 then v2 = vcon.nausea elseif aff.paralysis < 100 and v1 ~= vcon.paralysis then v2 = vcon.paralysis elseif aff.clumsiness <= 50 and v1 ~= vcon.clumsiness and manapercent > 40 then v2 = vcon.clumsiness elseif aff.empman < 100 and enFocus == true and manapercent > 40 and aff.impatience < 100 and aff.empimp < 100 then v2 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.asthma < 100 and v1 ~= vcon.asthma then v2 = vcon.asthma
elseif aff.addiction < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.addiction then v2 = vcon.addiction
elseif aff.weariness < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.weariness then v2 = vcon.weariness elseif aff.disloyalty < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.disloyalty then v2 = vcon.disloyalty elseif aff.addiction < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.addiction then v2 = vcon.addiction elseif aff.darkshade < 20 and aff.nausea >= 60 and v1 ~= vcon.darkshade then v2 = vcon.darkshade elseif aff.slickness < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.slickness then v2 = vcon.slickness else v2 = 'prefarar' end
if aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.slickness < 100 and aff.anorexia < 100 then v1 = vcon.anorexia v2 = vcon.slickness end
if ak.defs.rebounding or ak.defs.shield then if aff.empman < 100 then return "aconite" elseif aff.paralysis < 100 then return "curare" else return v1 end else if aff.guilt >= 50 and aff.stupid < 100 then return v1..' aconite' elseif aff.empimp == 100 and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.slickness <= 50 then return 'gecko slike' elseif aff.empman == 100 and manapercent < 40 and aff.empimp < 100 then if aff.asthma >= 60 and aff.slickness < 50 then v2 = vcon.slickness if aff.stupidity < 30 then v1 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.anorexia < 30 then v1 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.recklessness < 30 then v1 = vcon.recklessness elseif aff.dizziness < 30 then v1 = vcon.dizziness end
return v1..' '..v2 elseif aff.asthma >= 60 and aff.slickness >= 50 then if aff.stupidity < 30 then v1 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.anorexia < 30 then v1 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.recklessness < 30 then v1 = vcon.recklessness elseif aff.dizziness < 30 then v1 = vcon.dizziness end
if aff.stupidity < 30 and v1 ~= vcon.stupidity then v2 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.anorexia < 30 and v1 ~= vcon.anorexia then v2 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.recklessness < 30 and v1 ~= vcon.recklessness then v2 = vcon.recklessness elseif aff.dizziness < 30 and v1 ~= vcon.dizziness then v2 = vcon.dizziness end return v1..' '..v2 else return v1..' '..v2 end else return v1.." "..v2 end end end
function Runewarden.DwC.venom() local aff = table.deepcopy(Ltrack.score) local vcon = Runewarden.venoms local v1 = "" local v2 = ""
if Ltrack.mana <= 40 and aff.empimp < 100 and (aff.empman == 100 or aff.guilt == 100) then if aff.asthma < 100 then v1 = vcon.asthma elseif aff.slickness < 100 then v1 = vcon.slickness elseif aff.stupidity < 40 then v1 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.recklessness < 40 then v1 = vcon.recklessness elseif aff.dizziness < 40 then v1 = vcon.dizziness elseif aff.anorexia < 40 then v1 = vcon.anorexia end
if aff.slickness <= 50 and v1 ~= vcon.slickness and aff.asthma >= 50 then v2 = vcon.slickness elseif aff.weariness < 50 then v2 = vcon.weariness elseif aff.slickness >= 50 and aff.anorexia < 60 and v1 ~= vcon.anorexia then v2 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.dizziness < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.dizziness then v2 = vcon.dizziness elseif aff.slickness >= 50 and aff.anorexia < 60 and v1 ~= vcon.anorexia then v2 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.recklessness < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.recklessness then v2 = vcon.recklessness elseif aff.stupidity < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.stupidity then v2 = vcon.stupidity else v2 = 'curare' Legacy.panic('end of venom affs, for manapercent check') end
else --normal if aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.asthma >= 60 then v1 = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.nausea < 50 then v1 = vcon.nausea elseif table.size(lb.recentBreaks) > 0 and aff.asthma < 100 then v1 = vcon.asthma elseif aff.clumsiness <= 40 then v1 = vcon.clumsiness elseif aff.asthma < 100 then v1 = vcon.asthma
elseif aff.weariness < 20 then v1 = vcon.weariness elseif aff.disloyalty < 50 then v1 = vcon.disloyalty elseif aff.addiction < 50 then v1 = vcon.addiction elseif aff.darkshade < 20 and aff.nausea >= 60 then v1 = vcon.darkshade elseif aff.slickness < 100 then v1 = vcon.slickness end
if aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.slickness < 100 and aff.asthma >= 60 then v2 = vcon.slickness elseif aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and aff.slickness == 100 then v2 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.empman < 100 and Ltrack.totalaffs >= 3 and enFocus == true then v2 = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.paralysis < 100 and v1 ~= vcon.paralysis then v2 = vcon.paralysis elseif aff.clumsiness <= 50 and v1 ~= vcon.clumsiness then v2 = vcon.clumsiness elseif aff.asthma < 100 and v1 ~= vcon.asthma then v2 = vcon.asthma
elseif aff.addiction < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.addiction then v2 = vcon.addiction
elseif aff.weariness < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.weariness then v2 = vcon.weariness elseif aff.disloyalty < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.disloyalty then v2 = vcon.disloyalty elseif aff.addiction < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.addiction then v2 = vcon.addiction elseif aff.darkshade < 20 and aff.nausea >= 60 and v1 ~= vcon.darkshade then v2 = vcon.darkshade elseif aff.slickness < 50 and v1 ~= vcon.slickness then v2 = vcon.slickness else v2 = 'prefarar' end
if aff.impatience >= 60 and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.slickness < 100 and aff.anorexia < 100 then v1 = vcon.anorexia v2 = vcon.slickness end
end
if Ltrack.defs.rebounding or Ltrack.defs.shield then if aff.empman < 100 and Ltrack.totalaffs >= 3 then return "aconite" elseif aff.paralysis < 100 then return "curare" else return v1 end else if aff.empimp == 100 and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.slickness <= 50 then return 'gecko slike' else return v1.." "..v2 end end end

Script.name: SnB
Script.script:
function Runewarden.SnB.attack() local aff = table.deepcopy(affstrack.score) local vcon = Runewarden.venoms local LA = lb[target].hits["left arm"] local RA = lb[target].hits["right arm"] local LL = lb[target].hits["left leg"] local RL = lb[target].hits["right leg"] local T = lb[target].hits["torso"] local H = lb[target].hits["head"] local fer = tonumber(Legacy.Aranos.ferocity) --[[ Smash: High - Mentals Mid - Para Low - Clumsy
Strike: High - Stun Mid - Sensi Low - Prone
Drive Asthma ]]
attk = nil
--Limbs if not Runewarden.SnB.prepped("LL") and staticParry ~= "leftleg" and (parry ~= "leftleg" or aff.nausea == 100 or aff.paralysis == 100 or aff.prone == 100) then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "left leg"
elseif not Runewarden.SnB.prepped("T") and staticParry ~= "torso" and (parry ~= "torso" or aff.nausea == 100 or aff.paralysis == 100 or aff.prone == 100) then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "torso" elseif not Runewarden.SnB.prepped("RL") and staticParry ~= "rightleg" and (parry == "leftleg" or aff.nausea == 100 or aff.paralysis == 100 or aff.prone == 100) then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "right leg" elseif Runewarden.SnB.prepped("T") and T < 100 and (parry ~= "torso" or aff.nausea == 100 or aff.paralysis == 100 or aff.prone == 100) then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "torso" elseif Runewarden.SnB.prepped("LL") and T >= 100 and aff.prone < 100 and (parry ~= "leftleg" or aff.nausea == 100 or aff.paralysis == 100 or aff.prone == 100) then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "left leg" attk = "prone" elseif Runewarden.SnB.prepped("RL") and aff.prone < 100 and (parry ~= "rightleg" or aff.nausea == 100 or aff.paralysis == 100 or aff.prone == 100) then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "right leg" attk = "prone" else Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "" end
--Shield if aff.empoweredIsaz == 100 then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." high" elseif aff.dizziness >= 30 and aff.stupidity >= 30 and aff.epilepsy >= 30 and aff. asthma >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and enFocus == false then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." high" elseif aff.slickness == 100 then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." high" elseif aff.asthma >= 30 and aff.slickness >= 50 and aff.paralysis < 100 and aff.anorexia > 1 then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." mid" elseif aff.asthma >= 30 and aff.slickness >= 50 and aff.paralysis >=50 and enEat == false then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." high" elseif aff.paralysis < 100 then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." mid" elseif aff.clumsiness < 34 then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." low" elseif aff.asthma < 100 then Runewarden.SnB.shield = "drive "..target else Runewarden.SnB.shield = "smash "..target.." high" end
--Sword
if aff.empoweredIsaz == 100 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.dizziness >= 30 and aff.stupidity >= 30 and aff.epilepsy >= 30 and aff. asthma >= 60 and aff.anorexia < 100 and enFocus == false then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.anorexia elseif aff.prone == 100 and aff.paralysis == 100 and aff.slickness < 100 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.slickness elseif aff.slickness >=50 and aff.anorexia < 100 and Runewarden.SnB.shield == "smash "..target.." high" then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.anorexia elseif Runewarden.SnB.shield == "smash "..target.." mid" and aff.asthma >= 60 and affstrack.kelpscore >= 2 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.slickness elseif aff.anorexia >= 30 and aff.slickness > 1 then if aff.stupidity < 50 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.stupidity elseif aff.recklessness < 50 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.recklessness elseif aff.dizziness < 50 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.dizziness end elseif aff.paralysis < 100 and Runewarden.SnB.shield ~= "smash "..target.." mid" then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.paralysis elseif aff.weariness < 20 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.weariness elseif aff.clumsiness < 20 and aff.asthma < 100 then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.clumsiness elseif aff.asthma < 100 and Runewarden.SnB.shield ~= "drive "..target then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.asthma elseif aff.nausea < 100 and parry then Runewarden.SnB.venom = vcon.nausea
end
if fer >= 4 then if Runewarden.SnB.venom == "gecko" and Runewarden.SnB.shield == "smash "..target.." mid" and aff.prone < 100 then Runewarden.SnB.ferocity = "shieldstrike "..target.." low/" elseif aff.anorexia >= 30 and aff.prone == 100 then Runewarden.SnB.ferocity = "shieldstrike "..target.." high/" else Runewarden.SnB.ferocity = "" end else Runewarden.SnB.ferocity = "" end
if nohit == true then Runewarden.SnB.limbTar = "" end
if (ak.defs.shield or ak.defs.rebounding) then return Runewarden.SnB.pre.."combination "..target.." raze smash mid".."/assess" elseif ak.healthpercent <= 35 then --bisect return Runewarden.SnB.pre.."wield "..Runewarden.hugUlots.." shield/bisect "..target.."/assess" elseif aff.impaled == 100 then --disembowel return "disembowel/assess" elseif attk == "prone" then return Runewarden.SnB.pre.."combination slice "..Runewarden.SnB.limbTar.." "..Runewarden.SnB.venom.." trip/assess" elseif aff.prone == 100 and T >= 100 and (table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") or table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg")) then --impale return Runewarden.SnB.pre.."combination impale club/assess"
else return Runewarden.SnB.pre.."combination slice "..Runewarden.SnB.limbTar.." "..Runewarden.SnB.venom.." "..Runewarden.SnB.shield.."/"..Runewarden.SnB.ferocity.."assess" end end

Script.name: DwC
Script.script:
function Runewarden.DwC.attked() local LA = lb[target].hits["left arm"] local RA = lb[target].hits["right arm"] local LL = lb[target].hits["left leg"] local RL = lb[target].hits["right leg"] local T = lb[target].hits["torso"] local H = lb[target].hits["head"] local switchitup = math.random(1, 100) local aff = table.deepcopy(affstrack.score)
if (aff.nausea == 100 and affstrack.totalaffs >= 3)then parry = nil end
if aff.prone == 100 then parry = nil end
attk = nil
if ((attk == "impale" and aff.prone == 100) or attk == "none" or attk == "bisect") then else attk = nil if aff.prone == 100 and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") then attk = "impale" elseif ak.healthpercent <= 30 then attk = "bisect"
elseif LL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and ( not parry and switchitup >= 50 and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg")) then attk = "dsl" limb = "left leg" elseif RL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and switchitup <= 49 and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") then attk = "dsl" limb = "right leg" elseif T < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and aff.prone < 100 then attk = "dsl" limb = "torso" elseif T < math.floor(99 - (Runewarden.DwC.dsl/2)) and not parry and aff.prone < 100 then attk = "rsl" limb = "torso" elseif LL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dsl" limb = "left leg" elseif RL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dsl" limb = "right leg" elseif LL < math.floor(99 - (Runewarden.DwC.dsl/2)) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg")then attk = "rsl" limb = "left leg" elseif RL < math.floor(99 - (Runewarden.DwC.dsl/2)) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg")then attk = "rsl" limb = "right leg" elseif math.floor(T + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and not parry and T < 99 and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dsl" limb = "torso" elseif math.floor(RL + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and RL < 99 and aff.prone == 100 and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dslProne" limb = "right leg" elseif math.floor(LL + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and LL < 99 and aff.prone == 100 and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dslProne" limb = "left leg" elseif RL >= 90 and LL >= 90 and RL < 99 and T >= 100 and parry ~= "rightleg" and aff.prone < 100 and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "prone" limb = "right leg" elseif LL >= 90 and RL >= 90 and LL < 99 and T >= 100 and parry ~= "leftleg" and aff.prone < 100 and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "prone" limb = "left leg"
else attk = "dsl" limb = "" end end
if nohit == true then limb = '' end
if aff.prone == 100 and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") and aff.impaled < 100 then return "stand/stand/wield scimitar482220 scimitar482171/impale "..target.."/assess "..target elseif aff.impaled == 100 then return "push scintilla/say In Light be cleansed/disembowel" elseif ak.defs.rebounding or ak.defs.shield and attk ~= "impale" and aff.impaled < 100 then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/rsl "..target.." torso "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "dslProne" and aff.prone == 100 then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/dsl "..target.." "..limb.." prefarar prefarar/intimidate "..target.."/assess "..target elseif attk == "rsl" and aff.impaled < 100 then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/rsl "..target.." "..limb.." "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "bisect" then return "stand/stand/wield battleaxe370242 shield/bisect "..target.."/assess "..target.." assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "impale" then return "stand/stand/wield scimitar482220 scimitar482171/impale "..target.."/assess "..target elseif attk == "dsl" then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/dsl "..target.." "..limb.." "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "prone" then return "stand/stand/wield battleaxe370242/undercut "..target.." "..limb.."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "none" then else end end

Script.name: empower
Locking
Script.script:
function Runewarden.DwC.lock() local LA = lb[target].hits["left arm"] local RA = lb[target].hits["right arm"] local LL = lb[target].hits["left leg"] local RL = lb[target].hits["right leg"] local T = lb[target].hits["torso"] local H = lb[target].hits["head"] local switchitup = math.random(1, 100) local aff = table.deepcopy(affstrack.score)
if (aff.nausea == 100 and affstrack.totalaffs >= 3)then parry = nil end
if aff.prone == 100 then parry = nil end
attk = nil
if ((attk == "impale" and aff.prone == 100) or attk == "none" or attk == "bisect") then else attk = nil if aff.prone == 100 and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") then attk = "impale" elseif healthpercent <= 30 then attk = "bisect" elseif H < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and ( not parry and switchitup >= 50 and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "head")) then attk = "dsl" limb = "head" elseif LL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and ( not parry and switchitup >= 50 and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg")) then attk = "dsl" limb = "left leg" elseif RL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and switchitup <= 49 and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") then attk = "dsl" limb = "right leg" elseif LL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dsl" limb = "left leg" elseif RL < math.floor(99 - Runewarden.DwC.dsl) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" then attk = "dsl" limb = "right leg" elseif LL < math.floor(99 - (Runewarden.DwC.dsl/2)) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "left leg") then attk = "rsl" limb = "left leg" elseif RL < math.floor(99 - (Runewarden.DwC.dsl/2)) and not parry and attk ~= "impale" and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "right leg") then attk = "rsl" limb = "right leg" elseif math.floor(RL + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and RL < 99 and aff.prone == 100 and attk ~= "impale" and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "head") then attk = "dslProne" limb = "right leg" elseif math.floor(LL + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and LL < 99 and aff.prone == 100 and attk ~= "impale" and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "head") then attk = "dslProne" limb = "left leg" elseif RL >= 90 and LL >= 90 and RL < 99 and T >= 100 and parry ~= "rightleg" and aff.prone < 100 and attk ~= "impale" and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "head") then attk = "prone" limb = "right leg" elseif LL >= 90 and RL >= 90 and LL < 99 and T >= 100 and parry ~= "leftleg" and aff.prone < 100 and attk ~= "impale" and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "head") then attk = "prone" limb = "left leg"
else attk = "dsl" limb = "" end end
local postalias = "" if Runewarden.engage == false then postalias = "/engage "..target end
if nohit == true then limb = '' end
if ak.defs.rebounding or ak.defs.shield and attk ~= "impale" and aff.impaled < 100 then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/rsl "..target.." torso "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "dslProne" and aff.prone == 100 then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/dsl "..target.." "..limb.." prefarar prefarar/intimidate "..target.."/assess "..target elseif attk == "rsl" and aff.impaled < 100 then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/rsl "..target.." "..limb.." "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif aff.asthma >= 60 and aff.nausea >= 60 and math.floor(H + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, "head") and (math.floor(RL + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100 and math.floor(LL + Runewarden.DwC.dsl) >= 100) then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/dsl "..target.." head "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "bisect" then return "stand/stand/wield battleaxe370242 shield/bisect "..target.."/assess "..target.." assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "impale" then return "stand/stand/wield scimitar482220 scimitar482171/impale "..target.."/assess "..target elseif attk == "dsl" then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/dsl "..target.." "..limb.." "..Runewarden.DwC.venom().."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "prone" then return "stand/stand/wield battleaxe370242/undercut "..target.." "..limb.."/assess "..target..postalias elseif attk == "none" then else end end

Script.name: Runewarden DwC Attack
Script.script:
function Runewarden.DwC.attk() local LA = lb[target].hits["left arm"] local RA = lb[target].hits["right arm"] local LL = lb[target].hits["left leg"] local RL = lb[target].hits["right leg"] local T = lb[target].hits["torso"] local H = lb[target].hits["head"] local aff = table.deepcopy(Ltrack.score) local prepped = Runewarden.DwC.prepped local venom = Runewarden.DwC.venom() Runewarden.DwC.attack.state = '' Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = '' enClass = enClass or '' if (aff.nausea == 100 and Ltrack.totalaffs >= 3) then parry = nil end
if aff.prone == 100 then parry = nil end
if not prepped('H') and parry ~= 'head' then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'head' elseif not prepped('LL') and parry ~= 'leftleg' then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'left leg' elseif not prepped('RL') and parry ~= 'rightleg' then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'right leg'
--Undercut elseif not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'left leg') and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.disloyalty >= 50 and aff.prone < 100 and parry ~= 'leftleg' then Runewarden.DwC.attack.state = 'prone' Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'left leg' elseif not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'right leg') and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.disloyalty >= 50 and aff.prone < 100 and parry ~= 'rightleg' then Runewarden.DwC.attack.state = 'prone' Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'right leg'
--Head Break elseif prepped('H') and parry ~= 'head' and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'head') and (table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'left leg') or table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'right leg')) then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'head'
--DSL Break elseif aff.prone == 100 and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'left leg') and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'right leg') and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'head') then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'right leg' venom = 'delphinium delphinium' elseif aff.prone == 100 and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'right leg') and not table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'left leg') and table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'head') then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'left leg' venom = 'delphinium delphinium' else Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = '' end
-- if Ltrack.mana <= 55 and aff.empimp < 100 then -- if prepped('LL') and prepped('H') and aff.empman == 100 and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.slickness >= 50 then -- Runewarden.DwC.attack.state = 'prone' -- Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'left leg' -- venom = 'gecko' -- elseif prepped('RL') and prepped('H') and aff.empman == 100 and aff.asthma >= 50 and aff.slickness >= 50 then -- Runewarden.DwC.attack.state = 'prone' -- Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'right leg' -- venom = 'gecko' -- elseif prepped('H') and (table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'left leg') or table.contains(lb.recentBreaks, 'right leg')) and H < 100 then -- Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = 'head' -- venom = 'slike larkspur' -- end -- end
if Runewarden.engage == false then postalias = "/contemplate "..target.."/engage "..target else postalias = "/contemplate "..target end
if Ltrack.mana < 50 and (LL < 80 and H < 80 and RL < 80) then Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb = '' end
if Ltrack.defs.rebounding or Ltrack.defs.shield then return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/rsl "..target.." torso "..Runewarden.DwC.venom()..postalias elseif Runewarden.DwC.attack.state == 'prone' then return "stand/stand/wield battleaxe370242/undercut "..target.." "..Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb..postalias elseif Ltrack.health < 35 then return "stand/stand/unwield all/draw sword/wield sword394073/bisect "..target..postalias..'/sheathe sword' else return "stand/stand/wield "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.." "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimOne.."/wipe "..Runewarden.DwC.scimTwo.."/dsl "..target.." "..Runewarden.DwC.attack.limb.." "..venom..postalias end
end

Script.name: New script
DW attk
Script.script:
function ATTK() if gmcp.Char.Status.class ~= 'Depthswalker' then return end if autoattk ~= true then return end local score = Ltrack.score local vcon = Ltrack.venoms local swing = 'reap' --if autoattk == false then return end if score.weariness < 50 then instill = 'degeneration' elseif score.healthleech < 50 then instill = 'leach' elseif score.hypochondria < 30 then instill = 'depression' elseif not table.contains(Ltrack.dw.shadowList, target) and (score.timeloop > 50 and score.retribution >= 30) then instil = 'leach' elseif score.shadowmadness < 40 then instill = 'madness'
elseif score.retribution < 30 then instill = 'retribution' else instill = 'atrophy' end
if score.slickness > 0 and score.anorexia < 20 and score.shadowmadness >= 60 then v1 = vcon.anorexia elseif score.asthma >= 50 and score.slickness < 50 and score.shadowmadness >= 60 then v1 = vcon.slickness elseif score.hypochondria >= 50 and score.asthma < 50 and instill ~= 'leach' then v1 = vcon.asthma elseif score.asthma < 20 and Ltrack.totalaffs > 2 and instill ~= 'leach' then v1 = vcon.asthma elseif score.paralysis < 100 and instill ~= 'madness' and instill ~= 'depression' then v1 = vcon.paralysis elseif score.asthma < 100 then v1 = vcon.asthma elseif score.slickness < 50 then v1 = vcon.slickness else v1 = 'prefarar' end
if Ltrack.health <= 50 then swing = 'reap' else swing = 'reap' end
if Ltrack.defs.shield == true then Legacy.Q.free('stand/wield dagger158593 shield/shadow strike '..target..' kneel') elseif tonumber(Legacy.Aranos.age) < 200 and score.timeloop < 100 and (score.nausea >= 50 or (score.healthleech >= 60 and not table.contains(Ltrack.dw.shadowList, target))) then Legacy.Q.free('stand/wield scythe shield/wipe scythe/shadow attune '..target..' to degeneration/shadow instill scythe with retribution/chrono loop boost/shadow '..swing..' '..target..'/assess '..target) elseif (Ltrack.health <= 40 and table.contains(Ltrack.dw.shadowList, target)) then Legacy.Q.free('stand/wield dagger shield/shadow mutilate '..target) elseif (instill == 'madness' or instill == 'depression') and (score.timeloop < 100 and score.slickness > 0) and v1 ~= 'slike' then Legacy.Q.free('stand/wield scythe shield/wipe scythe/shadow attune '..target..' to degeneration/shadow instill scythe with '..instill..'/chrono loop/shadow '..swing..' '..target..'/assess '..target) else Legacy.Q.free('stand/wield scythe shield/wipe scythe/shadow attune '..target..' to degeneration/shadow instill scythe with '..instill..'/shadow '..swing..' '..target..' '..v1..'/assess '..target) end end registerAnonymousEventHandler('affsUpdated', 'ATTK')

Script.name: New script
Trades Setup
Conjuration Functions
Script.script:
function Conjure_Queue(item, num) if num == nil then num = 1 end if item == "mono" then item = "monolith" elseif item == "gem" then item = "negation" elseif item == "necklace" then item = "comprehension" elseif item == "mush" then item = "mushroom" elseif item == "dream" then item = "dreamcatcher" elseif item == "worry" or item == "stone" then item = "worrystone" end
Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items or {} for k,v in pairs(Legacy.Trades.Conjuration.Items[item:title()].Comms) do if math.floor(v * num) > Legacy.Rift.Commodities[k] then Legacy.echo("You do not have enough '<gold>"..k:title().."<white>' to make <gold>"..num.." "..item..".\n<DimGrey>(You need <gold>"..math.floor(v * num).." <white>"..k:title().."<DimGrey>, and only have <gold>"..Legacy.Rift.Commodities[k].."<DimGrey>)\n") end end if Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items[item] then Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items[item] = {num = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items[item].num , total = tonumber(num)} Legacy.echo("Adjusted <gold>"..item:title().."<white> total to <gold>"..num..".") else Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items[item] = {num = 0, total = tonumber(num)} Legacy.echo("Added <gold>"..num.." "..item:title().."<white> to your Conjuration queue.") end end
function Conjure_Comms() if Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.conjureFor == "" then return end local Comms = Legacy.Trades.Conjuration.Items[Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.conjureFor:title()].Comms for k,v in pairs(Comms) do send("outr "..v.." "..k) end end
function Conjure_Item() if table.size(Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items) == 0 then Legacy.echo("There is nothing left to Conjure!") return else sendAll("outr 50 kola", "get 1 gold from pack") for k,v in pairs(Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Items) do if v.num < v.total then Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.conjureFor = tostring(k) Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.currentaction = 1 end end end local Items = Legacy.Trades.Conjuration.Items local item = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.conjureFor:title() local action = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.currentaction local Steps = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.Steps
Conjure_Comms() if Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.ouroboros1 == nil then for k,v in pairs(gmcp.Char.Items.List.items) do if v.name == "a beguiling ouroboros" then Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.ouroboros1 = v.id break end end end
if Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.ouroboros2 == nil then for k,v in pairs(gmcp.Char.Items.List.items) do if v.name == "a beguiling ouroboros" and v.id ~= Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.ouroboros1 then Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.ouroboros2 = v.id break end end end
send(Items[item].createsyntax)
if Items[item].Actions[action] == "2" then send("queue addclear free "..Steps[Items[item].Actions[1]]..Legacy.Trades.Conjuration.ConjChant()) Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.currentaction = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.currentaction + 1 else send("queue addclear free "..Steps[Items[item].Actions[1]]) Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.currentaction = Legacy.Settings.Trades.Conjuration.currentaction + 1 end end

Script.name: download checks
Script.script: function myScriptInstalled(_, name) -- stop if what got installed isn't my thing cecho('<green>'..name) end registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysInstallPackage", myScriptInstalled)
